_note: Update the Projects page and homepage project cards by editing this file. Featured projects appear first.

projects.title: Quantum Dot Schrodinger/QCSE Solver
projects.summary: A flagship scientific computing project for modeling confined quantum states and electric-field effects in semiconductor nanostructures.
details: Built around numerical modeling, plotting, and careful interpretation of quantum dot behavior.
Intended to become a deeper technical writeup with assumptions, equations, validation notes, and examples.

projects.title: Hyperloop Design Team
projects.summary: Student design work involving engineering tradeoffs, analysis, documentation, prototyping, and testing.
details: Useful experience in turning open-ended engineering problems into practical team tasks.
Future notes can separate design contributions, documentation, and testing work.

projects.title: Cryogenics / Detector Lab Interests
projects.summary: A developing project area around low-temperature systems, measurement, instrumentation, and detector-adjacent lab skills.
details: Collecting concepts and references around cryogenic hardware, sensors, vacuum systems, and measurement habits.
Expected to grow into notes as lab experience and reading accumulate.

projects.title: Engineering Work Experience
projects.summary: Engineering and technical work experience focused on reliable execution, communication, and practical problem solving.
details: Reserved for concise summaries of work experience, responsibilities, tools, and outcomes.
Can later link outward to a resume or fuller experience page.

projects.title: corbinriches.com / This Website
projects.summary: A static Astro portfolio and personal homepage with data-driven notes, projects, bookshelf entries, and small local-only widgets.
details: Built as a maintainable old-web inspired site using Astro, Markdown, JSON data files, and small client-side scripts.
Also a place to practice technical writing, page structure, and lightweight interactive details.
